allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('events:',len\(d.get\('events',[]\)\)\); e=d['events'][0] if d.get\('events'\) else {}; comp=e.get\('competitions',[{}]\)[0] if e else {}; print\('has_odds:', 'odds' in comp\); print\('status:', e.get\('status',{}\).get\('type',{}\).get\('description'\) if e else None\); print\('name:', e.get\('name'\) if e else None\)")
